name: Compact Panel 600x800
description: Type 11 single-panel radiator for apartments and small rooms. Space-saving profile with high heat output.
specs: Dimensions: 600 mm (H) x 800 mm (W) x 63 mm (D)
Working pressure: 10 bar, test pressure: 13 bar

name: Compact Panel 600x1200
description: Mid-size Type 11 panel radiator for living areas. Powder-coated finish with RAL color options.
specs: Dimensions: 600 mm (H) x 1200 mm (W) x 63 mm (D)
RAL color options available on request

name: Double Panel 600x1000
description: Type 22 double-panel radiator delivering increased BTU output. Ideal for larger residential spaces.
specs: Dimensions: 600 mm (H) x 1000 mm (W) x 100 mm (D)
Supplied with wall brackets and air vent

name: Double Panel 500x1400
description: Wide-format Type 22 panel for under-window installation. Low profile, high efficiency.
specs: Dimensions: 500 mm (H) x 1400 mm (W) x 100 mm (D)
Low profile for unobstructed window sills

name: Triple Panel 600x1200
description: Type 33 triple-panel radiator for maximum heat output. Suited for poorly insulated or large rooms.
specs: Dimensions: 600 mm (H) x 1200 mm (W) x 157 mm (D)
Working pressure: 10 bar, test pressure: 13 bar
Ideal for poorly insulated or large-volume rooms

name: Vertical Panel 1800x500
description: Tall vertical panel radiator for narrow wall spaces. Modern aesthetic with top-mounted connections.
specs: Dimensions: 1800 mm (H) x 500 mm (W) x 77 mm (D)

name: Classic Column 2-col 600mm
description: Two-column steel radiator with timeless design. Available in 4 to 30 sections for custom lengths.

name: Classic Column 3-col 1200mm
description: Tall three-column radiator for period properties and premium renovations. Chrome finish available.
specs: Suited for period properties and premium interiors

name: Column 4-col 600mm
description: Four-column high-output radiator for heritage installations. Cast iron or steel construction.
specs: Heritage style, suitable for listed buildings

name: Horizontal Column 300x1500
description: Low-profile horizontal column radiator for under-window placement. Brushed nickel finish option.

name: Vertical Column 1800x380
description: Slim vertical column radiator for hallways and narrow spaces. Dual-fuel compatible.
specs: Available in white, anthracite, or custom RAL

name: Industrial Floor Unit HD-2000
description: Heavy-duty floor-standing unit for warehouses and factories. Anti-corrosion treated for harsh environments.
specs: Construction: heavy-gauge steel with anti-corrosion coating
Designed for warehouses, factories, and workshops

name: Industrial Wall Mount WM-1500
description: Wall-mounted industrial radiator for commercial buildings. High-output steel panel construction.
specs: Suitable for commercial and light industrial spaces

name: Industrial Floor Unit HD-3000
description: Extra-capacity floor unit for large industrial halls. Working pressure up to 16 bar.
specs: Construction: reinforced steel with anti-corrosion treatment
Working pressure: 16 bar, test pressure: 24 bar
Suitable for halls up to 300 m²

name: Industrial Ceiling Mount CM-1200
description: Ceiling-suspended heating unit for workshops with limited wall and floor space. Thermostatic valve ready.
specs: Includes mounting brackets and suspension kit
Ideal for workshops with limited wall/floor space
